comment: Seed tile set. Demographics must sum to 1.0. defense 0 = player start. Leichhardt is tile #1 always.

tiles.name: Leichhardt
tiles.notes: The flagship. Where it all started.

tiles.name: Rosebery
tiles.notes: Office lunch trade. Dead on weekends, printing money Tue-Fri 12-2.

tiles.name: Neutral Bay
tiles.notes: Affluent families. High ticket, low tolerance for a soggy chip.

tiles.name: Newtown
tiles.notes: Students and 1am trade. Locked until a student-affinity special is proven.

tiles.name: Marrickville
tiles.notes: THE butcher tile. Control this and the whole inner-west supply line hums.

tiles.name: Surry Hills
tiles.notes: Office by day, bar crawl by night. Two peaks, one venue.

tiles.name: Haberfield
tiles.notes: Quiet family suburb. Easy first capture, modest ceiling.

tiles.name: Parramatta
tiles.notes: The second CBD. Big prize, big defense. Opens the western corridor.

tiles.name: Bondi
tiles.notes: Tourist demand bonus in summer game-months. Everyone wants Bondi. That's the problem.
